series_metadata.series_description: Responses to customer inquiries regarding Child Support program services and case disposition. Inquiries can be by telephone (call center tallies), paper or via electronic transmission. Information may include name, address, county and state, obligor, requester and nature of inquiry.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office , 4 years in records center printed reports no longer of adminstrative value, . ; Electronic: superseded, obsolete or replaced
